source_message: Oracle 01-29 NY-AM: approved no-trade / stand-aside. Fresh fold has no actual packet on MNQ or MES. MES displacement leader exists but MES has poor price action and no setup; MNQ context is clean/aligned at open but still no executable packet forms. Do not promote the pair-leader signal alone.

oracle_context.approval_note: User approved final cleanup 2026-07-02: no actual setup on either instrument; pair-leader signal alone is insufficient.

mnq_context.open_reaction: AS.L rejection -> bullish aligned; A+ cap

mes_context.open_reaction: AS.L pending/continuation -> bearish divergent; B cap

oracle_context.no_trade_reason: No bestPacket / packet_ready on either instrument; MES leader signal is not tradable without price quality and a setup.
